description: Phase X2 — slice definitions used by the eval rollup and the validate-and-baseline workflow. Each slice declares a predicate that, when applied to a source_record / orchestration_result / eval pair, decides slice membership. The agenda_detection slice is a catch-all so transcripts whose .docx has no detectable agenda headers do not gap the membership check.

slices.description: Transcripts where heuristic_agenda_detector found zero headers; every chunk has agenda_item_id == 'unclassified'.
Transcripts with at least one detected agenda item.
